summary: Sets max cap per freq tran.
description: Sets max cap per freq tran.
usage: setMaxCapPerFreqTran [-help] -cap {{cap11 cap12 ...} {cap21 cap22 ..} ..} [-force] -freq {freq1 freq2 ...} [-inputpin <inputpin>] [-lib <libName>] -pins {cell outputpin} -tran {freq1 freq2 ...}

options.name: -cap
options.description: {{cap11 cap12 ...} {cap21 cap22 ..} ..} specify a Nfreq x Ntran table of capacitance values

options.name: -force
options.description: Compute maxCap from interpolated -freq, -tran and -cap values

options.name: -freq
options.description: specify a list of at least two frequency values

options.name: -inputpin
options.description: specify an input pin name for the input transition in -tran

options.name: -pins
options.description: Add new capacitance constraints to the specified set of cells and pins

options.name: -tran
options.description: specify a list of at least two transition values
